title: Orlando Pirates relaunch branch in Mossel Bay
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Various roles in the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Various roles in the Mossel Bay branch of the Orlando Pirates FC were recently filled during an election meeting at Indwe Secondary School in KwaNonqaba.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Various roles in the Mossel Bay branch of the Orlando Pirates FC were recently filled during an election meeting at Indwe Secondary School in KwaNonqaba."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The elections were held as a relaunch of this branch. The roles of chairperson, secretary, youth leader and treasurer, among others, were decided.","html":"The elections were held as a relaunch of this branch. The roles of chairperson, secretary, youth leader and treasurer, among others, were decided."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The newly elected members are Sinethemba Nkwali (chairperson), Bongiwe Ngqawana (secretary), Ntomboxolo Jacobs (treasurer), Jimmy Ntshovulana (deputy chairperson), Khanyisile Mongameli (deputy secretary), Piet Makunga (branch organiser), Siyabonga Mnyibashe (transport organiser), Abongile Fihlani (branch spokesperson), Mncedisi Saula (branch disciplinary committee) and Wandisile Macebo (youth leader).","html":"The newly elected members are Sinethemba Nkwali (chairperson), Bongiwe Ngqawana (secretary), Ntomboxolo Jacobs (treasurer), Jimmy Ntshovulana (deputy chairperson), Khanyisile Mongameli (deputy secretary), Piet Makunga (branch organiser), Siyabonga Mnyibashe (transport organiser), Abongile Fihlani (branch spokesperson), Mncedisi Saula (branch disciplinary committee) and Wandisile Macebo (youth leader)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Former Orlando Pirates player Edward Motale was also in attendance at the election meeting.","html":"Former Orlando Pirates player Edward Motale was also in attendance at the election meeting."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Orlando Pirates relaunch branch in Mossel Bay
